MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. RON ARCHER OF THE LAW FIRM OF BRAYTON & PURCELL, TEL. NO. 898-1555 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SARA M. PARKER OF THE LAW FIRM OF MCKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE, TEL. NO. 267-4117 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE ELEMENTS OF ITS AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE AND PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO EXPOSURE. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/AY

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: March 6, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Matthew B. Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Norris Wallace.
No appearance by defendant Waldron Duffy, Inc.
Default entered against defendant on 09/11/07.
Doe defendants dismissed on 09/11/07.
Order waiving witness appearance at Default Prove-Up Hearing filed on 02/26/08.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Norris Wallace, and against the Defaulted Defendant Waldron Duffy, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $330,120.00.

Interest & Costs as provided by law, in an amount to be determined by the Court.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court for review no later than March 10, 2008.
